stories.title: packages/render-sdk/package.json with subpath exports + optional peers
acceptanceCriteria: packages/render-sdk/package.json has name '@remocn/render-sdk', version '0.0.0', type 'module', sideEffects false, license MIT
exports map has '.', './server', './lambda' each pointing to ./dist/<x>/index.js + .d.ts (root '.' -> ./dist/index.{js,d.ts})
files is ["dist","README.md"]; publishConfig.access is 'public'
dependencies has p-limit (^6.x); peerDependencies has @remotion/renderer and @remotion/lambda (>=4.0.0) both marked optional in peerDependenciesMeta
devDependencies include @remotion/renderer, @remotion/lambda, typescript ^6.0.3
scripts: build (bun run scripts/build.ts), dev (--watch), test (bun test), types (tsc --noEmit)

stories.title: tsconfig.json + tsconfig.build.json
acceptanceCriteria: packages/render-sdk/tsconfig.json: strict, moduleResolution bundler|nodenext, verbatimModuleSyntax, noEmit true, lib includes ESNext and DOM
packages/render-sdk/tsconfig.build.json extends base, declaration true, emitDeclarationOnly true, outDir dist, noEmit false, include ["src"]
tsc --noEmit passes in packages/render-sdk with zero errors

stories.title: bunfig.toml test config
acceptanceCriteria: packages/render-sdk/bunfig.toml exists with a [test] section
bun test runs in packages/render-sdk (zero tests OK, exit 0)

stories.title: scripts/build.ts emits ESM + .d.ts to dist with externals
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/build.ts reads entrypoints from pkg.exports (., ./server, ./lambda) mapping dist/x.js -> src/x.ts
Bun.build runs with target node, format esm, outdir dist; external covers peerDependencies + dependencies + node builtins
After build, dist/index.js, dist/server/index.js, dist/lambda/index.js exist and matching *.d.ts emitted via tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
No @remotion/* or p-limit source is inlined into any dist output (grep dist for 'p-limit'/'@remotion' import specifiers only)
dist/ is cleaned before each build; --watch flag re-runs on change

stories.title: src placeholder entrypoints + README stub
acceptanceCriteria: src/index.ts, src/server/index.ts, src/lambda/index.ts exist with trivial placeholder exports (e.g. export const VERSION or export {})
packages/render-sdk/README.md stub exists
src directory shape mirrors the dist/server, dist/lambda subpath layout

stories.title: Workspace install + build green end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: bun install at repo root resolves with remotion peers present as devDeps, no errors; bun.lock updated
bun run build (in packages/render-sdk) exits 0 and produces the three dist entries + .d.ts
Root-importing the built dist root export resolves (e.g. node import of dist/index.js)
bun test exits 0 and tsc --noEmit passes in packages/render-sdk
